warnings: Confidence capped because the output identifies core SAP runtime behavior that is not SQL-convertible.
assumptions: Only translating the active (uncommented) INNER JOIN section as specified in the ABAP source
Stripped ABAP annotations (@AccessControl, @EndUserText) as they have no SQL equivalent
Converted ABAP table~column syntax to SQL table.column syntax
conversion_notes: Translated ABAP CDS DEFINE VIEW to SQL CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW
Converted ABAP inner join syntax to standard SQL INNER JOIN
Preserved the exact join condition and column aliases from the active code section
Ignored all commented out join examples (LEFT OUTER, RIGHT OUTER, CROSS JOIN) as they are not active in the source
